content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

All three amendments are confirmed by code inspection. Amendment fr-2-a9bceba3 is a minor but correct naming fix. Amendment fr-2-8377bd8d identifies a real validation bug: `validate_canonical_prompt_shape` uses `.position()` on all lines, so embedded `## Acceptance Criteria` headings from bead descriptions (confirmed present in nearly every bead in issues.jsonl) will be found before the real contract section, causing false out-of-order rejections during post-review re-validation at prompt_review.rs:246. Amendment fr-2-4a73bd87 identifies a real scope contamination issue: bead descriptions containing `Non-goals:` blocks (confirmed in at least 6 beads) are dumped verbatim into `Must-Do Scope`, contradicting the contract guidance that treats that section as in-scope work.

## Votes

- `fr-2-a9bceba3`: Accept
  Confirmed at task_prompt_contract.rs:131: `let headings: Vec<&str> = prompt.lines().map(str::trim).collect()` collects ALL trimmed lines, not headings. The variable is used in a public validation function that downstream stages depend on. Renaming to `trimmed_lines` is low-risk and improves readability for future maintainers.
- `fr-2-8377bd8d`: Accept
  Confirmed the full bug chain: (1) service.rs:540-543 inserts `bead_description` verbatim into `## Must-Do Scope`; (2) issues.jsonl shows nearly every bead description contains `## Acceptance Criteria` as an embedded heading; (3) validate_canonical_prompt_shape at line 135 uses `headings.iter().position()` which finds the FIRST match across ALL lines, so the embedded `## Acceptance Criteria` inside Must-Do Scope will be found before the real contract-level Acceptance Criteria section; (4) prompt_review.rs:246 re-validates the refined prompt and will reject it as out-of-order. This is a real, triggerable bug — not theoretical. Either the validator must restrict matching to top-level sections (e.g., only lines that are the sole content of their line and follow a blank line or start of section), or the generator must sanitize/escape embedded contract headings.
- `fr-2-4a73bd87`: Accept
  Confirmed: (1) consumer_guidance_body at task_prompt_contract.rs:70-71 explicitly tells consumers to treat `Must-Do Scope` + `Acceptance Criteria` as in-scope and `Explicit Non-Goals` as out-of-scope; (2) service.rs:540-543 dumps the full bead_description into Must-Do Scope; (3) service.rs:544-547 fills Explicit Non-Goals only from milestone_non_goals; (4) issues.jsonl confirms at least 6 beads contain `Non-goals:` blocks in their descriptions. These bead-local non-goals end up presented as in-scope work, contradicting the contract semantics. The generator should parse and relocate bead-local non-goals to the Explicit Non-Goals section.
